name: Henry Hotline | Finding Frankie
description:
a literal captive audience.

──────────﹒★﹒﹒─

twenty-five seasons already; how time flies. twenty-five seasons of being shoved to the side as a convenient plot device, twenty-five seasons of being completely ignored… for the sake of what? some cheap gorefest?
